item.title: Best Sports Betting Apps 2026: Top Betting Sites Reviewed
item.description: Compare the best sports betting apps and sites for 2026. See reviews, bonuses, and features to help choose the right sportsbook for your needs.

item.title: 4 Takeaways From UConn's Historic Blowout vs. Rick Pitino's St. John's
item.description: FOX Sports' Michael Cohen's takeaways from UConn's demolition of St. John's as the Big East race winds down.

item.title: Olivia Olson's Game-Winner Lifts No. 8 Michigan Over No. 13 Ohio State in OT
item.description: Olivia Olson scored a career-high 31 points and made a game-winning shot with 3.2 seconds left in overtime to help No. 8 Michigan beat No. 13 Ohio Sta...

item.title: Nick Wright: Give Brandon Aubrey 'Kicker Version of the Mahomes Deal'
item.description: FOX Sports' Nick Wright would prioritize signing Brandon Aubrey over George Pickens in free agency.
